initial_test_output:
=== Raft Snapshot Commit-Gap Test ===
Building...
--- Round 1 ---
DUPLICATE: key10 applied 2 times
DUPLICATE: key2 applied 2 times
DUPLICATE: key5 applied 2 times
DUPLICATE: key3 applied 2 times
DUPLICATE: key9 applied 2 times
DUPLICATE: key4 applied 2 times
DUPLICATE: key6 applied 2 times
DUPLICATE: key1 applied 2 times
DUPLICATE: key8 applied 2 times
DUPLICATE: key7 applied 2 times
FAIL: 10 keys had duplicate state machine transitions
FAIL: Duplicate applies detected in round 1

FAIL: State machine has duplicate entries after snapshot+restart sequence

The 4-step reproduction:
  1. Leader writes entries 1-10, replicates to all nodes
  2. Leader takes snapshot at index 10
  3. Leader sends snapshot to slow follower (node3)
  4. Leader changes, node3 restarts, new leader replicates

Run 'raft-snapshot simulate' for detailed trace.
